docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HOLANDA, SILVANA AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, MARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED FEB-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, MARCIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-17-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. A MESSENGER NAMED JUNIOR VALDISIO HOLANDA, BROUGHT A LETTER FROM KAISER PERMANENTE TO THE COURT ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF STATING THAT THE PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO ATTEND TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLANDA, SILVANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORLANDO, MARCIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-29-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "CONTINUED HEARING", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR TODAYS HEARING . DEFENDANT WAS SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE; POS IS DEFECTIVE AS THERE IS NO DATE AND PLACE OF MAILING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HOLANDA, SILVANA
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLANDA, SILVANA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-09-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORLANDO, MARCIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-05-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE; POS IS DEFECTIVE AS THERE IS NO DATE AND PLACE OF MAILING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-16-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. UNTIMELY SERVICE. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
